arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson wanted by top European clubs: Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, Arsenal & more interested
arts.sum: Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, and Arsenal are just a number of top European clubs keeping tabs on Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson, according to Jason Pettigrove. The Swedish international only moved…

arts.ttl: Krösche reveals Frankfurt missed out on signing Olise
arts.sum: Markus Krösche reveals that Eintracht Frankfurt looked into the possibility of signing Michael Olise three years ago, but couldn't afford him.
